options.name: --ControlUrl
options.description: URL for managing rules dynamically. Not required. Example: http://localhost:5001.

options.name: --DefaultContentType
options.description: The Content-Type used in a response message when no rule matching the request is found.

options.name: --DefaultContentValue
options.description: The Content used in a response message when no rule matching the request is found.

options.name: --DefaultDelayMin
options.description: The delay (in milliseconds) before sending a default response message when no matching rule for the request is found. Default: 0.

options.name: --DefaultDelayMax
options.description:
The maximum delay (in milliseconds) before sending a default response message when no matching rule for the request is found.
When --DefaultDelayMax is specified, the actual delay will be a random value between --DefaultDelayMin and --DefaultDelayMax.

options.name: --DefaultStatusCode
options.description: The HTTP status code used in a response message when no rule matching the request is found. Default: 200.

options.name: --LogControlRequestAndResponse
options.description: Whether control requests and responses are logged. Default: false.

options.name: --LogRequestAndResponse
options.description: Whether requests and responses are logged. Default: true.

options.name: --RequestBodyLogLimit
options.description: Maximum request body size to log (in bytes). Default: 4096.

options.name: --ResponseBodyLogLimit
options.description: Maximum response body size to log (in bytes). Default: 4096.

options.name: --Rules
options.description: Rules file. It can be a file name of a file that exists in the current directory or a full path to a file.

options.name: --SaveRequests
options.description: The directory where request messages are saved.

options.name: --SaveResponses
options.description: The directory where response messages are saved.

options.name: --Url
options.description:
URL for simulating endpoints. Default: http://localhost:5000.
--Url and --ControlUrl cannot share the same value.
